Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Harnessing laser-induced in-situ nanowhiskers for high-strength aluminum alloys via additive manufacturing

Composition_Info.Note: Commercial AA2024 Al alloy; powder size 15-53 μm

Process_Text.original: LPBF processing using EP-M260 machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd., China) equipped with ytterbium fiber laser (λ~1070 nm, spot size ~75 μm, max power ~500 W); protective argon atmosphere; optimized parameters: P=300 W, ν=1100 mm/s, h=100 μm, t=40 μm; stripes scanning strategy with 67° rotation between adjacent layers; substrate preheated to 45°C.
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF with laser power 300 W, scanning speed 1100 mm/s, layer thickness 40 μm, hatch spacing 100 μm

Process_Info.Equipment: EP-M260 LPBF machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.)

Microstructure_Text.original: Predominantly coarse columnar grains approximately tens of μm wide extending over several tens to hundreds of μm across multiple melt pools; strong <001> texture parallel to build direction; cracks along columnar grain boundaries propagating across several grains; large pores predominantly located near grain boundaries.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Coarse columnar grains with strong <001> texture; hot cracking along GBs; high defect density

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XRD: Phase identification confirming Al2Cu θ phase; S phase peaks absent
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EBSD: IPF and PF maps showing strong <001> texture parallel to build direction; grain size 18.2 μm
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Nano-CT: Defect volume fraction 4.698%; cracks oriented parallel to build direction (Z-axis)

Composition_Info.Note: AA2024-1.5 wt.% B mixed powder; boron from amorphous B powder (>99.8% purity, avg <5 μm); after in-situ reaction forms MgAlB4 nanowhiskers

Process_Text.original: LPBF processing using EP-M260 machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd., China) equipped with ytterbium fiber laser (λ~1070 nm, spot size ~75 μm, max power ~500 W); protective argon atmosphere; optimized parameters: P=300 W, ν=1100 mm/s, h=100 μm, t=40 μm; stripes scanning strategy with 67° rotation between adjacent layers; substrate preheated to 45°C. Solution treatment (ST) at 505°C for 1 h in muffle furnace, water quenching to room temperature, natural aging at 25°C for 30 days.
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF (P=300W, ν=1100mm/s, t=40μm, h=100μm) + solution treatment at 505°C/1h + water quench + natural aging 25°C/30d

Process_Info.Equipment: EP-M260 LPBF machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.); Muffle furnace for heat treatment

Microstructure_Text.original: Ultrafine equiaxed grain structure (avg 1.5 μm); random orientations indicating nearly texture-free character; no defects detected within Al matrix; in-situ formed MgAlB4 phase with whisker morphology (diameters 5-15 nm, lengths up to several hundred nm, aspect ratio >20); whiskers randomly oriented and uniformly distributed throughout matrix; some whiskers entrapped within grains, others along grain boundaries; coherent interface between whisker (0112) and Al matrix (200) with lattice mismatch 2.5%; Cu segregation along whisker-matrix interfaces.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Ultrafine equiaxed grains (~1.5 μm); near-full density (99.991%); MgAlB4 nanowhiskers (5-15 nm dia, aspect ratio >20) uniformly distributed; coherent whisker/Al interface

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XRD: MgAlB4 peaks confirmed; no residual B; θ phase present, S phase absent
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EBSD: IPF showing equiaxed grains ~1.5 μm; random orientations; texture-free; KAM maps showing reduced local stress concentration
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM/STEM: MgAlB4 whiskers 5-15 nm diameter; atomic resolution showing layered Mg-B-Al-B structure; coherent whisker/Al interface (0112)//(200) with δ=2.5%
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Nano-CT: Overall density 99.991%; only few small spherical gas pores; no cracking
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EELS/EDS: Whisker composition confirmed as Mg, Al, B

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; constant strain rate; extensometer for strain measurement
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 dog-bone specimens; gauge section 5 mm diameter, 30 mm length

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 573.15 K (300°C); held 15 min for thermal equilibrium; extensometer for strain measurement
Properties_Info.Note: Decrease due to recrystallization temperature of Al-Cu matrix typically below 300°C; performance comparable to conventional heat-resistant Al alloys

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 298.15 K; constant strain rate; extensometer for strain measurement
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 dog-bone specimens; gauge section 5 mm diameter, 30 mm length

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 423.15 K (150°C); held 15 min for thermal equilibrium; extensometer for strain measurement
Properties_Info.Note: Solution treated + naturally aged 30 days; one of highest-performing additively manufactured Al alloys at elevated temperature

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 473.15 K (200°C); held 15 min for thermal equilibrium; extensometer for strain measurement
at 523.15 K (250°C); held 15 min for thermal equilibrium; extensometer for strain measurement
at 298.15 K; constant strain rate; extensometer for strain measurement
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM E8 dog-bone specimens; gauge section 5 mm diameter, 30 mm length
Properties_Info.Note: Solution treated + naturally aged 30 days; uniform elongation

Composition_Info.Note: AA2024-1.5 wt.% B mixed powder; as-built state without solution treatment; boron from amorphous B powder (>99.8% purity)

Process_Text.original: LPBF processing using EP-M260 machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd., China) equipped with ytterbium fiber laser (λ~1070 nm, spot size ~75 μm, max power ~500 W); protective argon atmosphere; optimized parameters: P=300 W, ν=1100 mm/s, h=100 μm, t=40 μm; stripes scanning strategy with 67° rotation between adjacent layers; substrate preheated to 45°C. As-built condition without solution treatment.
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF (P=300W, ν=1100mm/s, t=40μm, h=100μm); as-built state (no heat treatment)

Process_Info.Equipment: EP-M260 LPBF machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.)

Microstructure_Text.original: MgAlB4 nanowhiskers with diameters 5-15 nm and aspect ratios >20; uniformly distributed throughout matrix; in-situ formed during LPBF process; similar whisker morphology to ST sample.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: MgAlB4 nanowhiskers (5-15 nm dia, aspect ratio >20) uniformly distributed; as-built condition

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XRD: MgAlB4 peaks confirmed; no residual B detected; complete reaction of B with Al and Mg
